channel.title: Welcome to my blog! :tada: on Bhumish's Blog :tada:
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome to my blog! :tada: on Bhumish's Blog :tada:

item.title: MFA - Why do we match numbers to approve MFA sign-in?
item.description: In our MFA Authenticator apps, now we need to enter numbers shown during login - why did the vendors enforce this? To stop MFA bombarding attacks.

item.title: About Me
item.description: This is my personal journal where I write articles mostly about Information Security. I enjoy the world of Security - be it related to software or hardware or cloud. I have been a part of this domain since almost 12 years, where I started the official journey with getting a Master’s degree in Network Security, and then started working professionally with various organizations. I have worked in many fields of security, including Vulnerability Management, Application Security, Security Analystics, Threat Hunting, Forensics, Penetration Testing, Auditing. Currently working as a Senior Pentester, finding security issues in Cloud, Web and Mobile applications. For any feedback or comments regarding my blog, you can connect with me on my email: bhumish[@]live[.]com There are no heavy scripts or analytics on this whole blog as I am a supporter of privacy and speed.

item.title: Building an Effective Vulnerability Management Program
item.description: Unleashing the Risk Based Vulnerability Management, a security update to your traditional VM Process

item.title: Security Considerations for Smart Cameras
item.description: Designing smart-iot cameras? Read this to check out the security perpective

item.title: An Innovative Email Verification Technique for Spam
item.description: Received a spam mail. Dissected the links to find something new!

item.title: Bugs — Easy To Find, Tough To Report
item.description: Describing one scenario, showing how tough it is to report a bug when the company doesn’t have a VDP

item.title: Bypass Root detection in Android - by modifying the APK
item.description: A trick on how to bypass the root-detection mechanism applied by any Android APK

item.title: Instagram - Your posts are not really private
item.description: Instagram has a forceful-browsing vulnerability where someone else can view your posts by knowing the URL.

item.title: Remote Logging with Rsyslog
item.description: A quick tutorial on working with Rsyslog - the log processing utility.

item.title: SQL Truncation Vulnerability
item.description: A brief explainer on the SQL Truncation Vulnerability

item.title: SQL Truncation Vulnerability
item.description: A brief explainer on the SQL Truncation Vulnerability

item.title: Evading mod_evasive on Apache
item.description: Bypassing the security mechanism of mod_evasive module (defense against DoS attacks) in Apache web server

item.title: Truecaller for BSNL Landline Phones
item.description: Bill Payment portal for BSNL landlines is exposing the phone-owner’s details without any verification. These quick lines explain how.

item.title: Python based Phonebook Course on Codecademy
item.description: Announcement on my new Python based interactive course

item.title: What is Phone-DNS and Why we can’t implement it now
item.description: An idea on mapping the phone numbers with meaningful-memorable shortcodes, similar to the DNS system

item.title: File Upload flaw in Wordpress
item.description: Found a flaw in Wordpress hosting where users can upload any kind of file - bypassing the mechanism to allow only white-listed file types

item.title: And one more hashing utility!
item.description: Created a tiny Python script for Hashing

item.title: Common problems during initial Honeyd configuration
item.description: I faced and resolved some issues while working with HoneyD honeypot. This involved a lot of research on the interwebz, as this used to be a very niche utility.

item.title: A free gift with the dynamic IP
item.description: I used to have dynamic IP assigned by the ISP - and I faced a problem which was like a gift bundled with my IP address.

item.title: Simplyhash Python Utility
item.description: A tiny Python script for Hashing

item.title: Why is it necessary to keep your email secure?
item.description: You need to keep your email as the most secure item, after your finances
